data.queryValue:
WITH
-- 0) Параметры
list_p AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g') = '' THEN NULL
      ELSE string_to_array(
             regexp_replace($$ {{geo_list}} $$,'E''|''|\(|\)|\s','', 'g'), ','
           )::text[]
    END AS geo_arr
),
param_p AS (
  SELECT COALESCE({{date_book_interval}}, 14)::int AS book_window_days
),

-- 1) Глобальные старты сессий (по всей истории, без фильтров интервала)
session_starts AS (
  SELECT
    v.person_key,
    v.geo,
    v.booking_date::date AS episode_start
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  WHERE v.prev_booking_date IS NULL
     OR (v.booking_date::date - v.prev_booking_date::date) > (SELECT book_window_days FROM param_p)
),

-- 2) Первая сессия в жизни (когорта)
first_session AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (s.person_key)
         s.person_key,
         s.geo                                      AS first_geo,
         s.episode_start                            AS first_session_date,
         date_trunc('month', s.episode_start)::date AS cohort_month
  FROM session_starts s
  ORDER BY s.person_key, s.episode_start, s.geo
),

-- 3) Число сессий у клиента (возвращался ли когда-нибудь)
sessions_per_person AS (
  SELECT person_key, COUNT(*) AS total_sessions
  FROM session_starts
  GROUP BY person_key
),

-- 4) Когорты в выбранных GEO (по GEO первой сессии) и интервале дат первой сессии
cohort_scoped AS (
  SELECT
    fs.person_key,
    fs.first_geo,
    fs.first_session_date,
    fs.cohort_month,
    sp.total_sessions
  FROM first_session fs
  JOIN sessions_per_person sp USING (person_key)
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE fs.first_geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR fs.first_geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
    AND fs.first_session_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND fs.first_session_date <  {{interval_to}}::date   -- полуинтервал [from, to)
),

-- 5) Следующая сессия после первой (для расчёта дней до повтора)
next_repeat AS (
  SELECT
    c.person_key,
    c.cohort_month,
    MIN(s2.episode_start) AS next_episode_start
  FROM cohort_scoped c
  JOIN session_starts s2
    ON s2.person_key = c.person_key
   AND s2.episode_start > c.first_session_date
  GROUP BY c.person_key, c.cohort_month
),
cohort_median_days AS (
  SELECT
    nr.cohort_month,
    percentile_disc(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
      ORDER BY (nr.next_episode_start::date - c.first_session_date::date)
    )::int AS median_days_to_repeat
  FROM next_repeat nr
  JOIN cohort_scoped c
    ON c.person_key = nr.person_key
   AND c.cohort_month = nr.cohort_month
  GROUP BY nr.cohort_month
),

-- 6) Уникальные покупатели месяца (в выбранных GEO и интервале по фактическим покупкам)
monthly_unique_buyers AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', v.booking_date)::date AS month,
    COUNT(DISTINCT v.person_key)              AS buyers_in_month
  FROM v_person_purchases_prev v
  CROSS JOIN list_p lp
  WHERE v.geo IN ('ОАЭ','Москва','Грузия','Таиланд','Бали','Таиланд Eng')
    AND (lp.geo_arr IS NULL OR v.geo = ANY(lp.geo_arr))
    AND v.booking_date >= {{interval_from}}::date
    AND v.booking_date <  {{interval_to}}::date
  GROUP BY 1
)

-- 7) Итог по когортам
SELECT
  to_char(c.cohort_month, 'MM.YYYY') AS "Период",
  COUNT(*)                           AS "Впервые купили",             -- впервые пришли в этом месяце
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.total_sessions >= 2)
                                    AS "Позже купили повторно",        -- из них вернулись когда-нибудь
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE c.total_sessions >= 2)
        / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2)   AS "Retention rate",
  mub.buyers_in_month               AS unique_buyers_in_month,  -- все покупатели этого месяца (в выбранных GEO)
  cmd.median_days_to_repeat         AS "Через сколько купили, медиана, дни"     -- медиана дней до ПЕРВОГО повтора (только у вернувшихся)
FROM cohort_scoped c
LEFT JOIN monthly_unique_buyers mub
  ON mub.month = c.cohort_month
LEFT JOIN cohort_median_days cmd
  ON cmd.cohort_month = c.cohort_month
GROUP BY c.cohort_month, mub.buyers_in_month, cmd.median_days_to_repeat
ORDER BY c.cohort_month DESC
